Offsets.name: OFSZ
Offsets.description: User-set offset adjustment in twos complement format with a scale factor of 15.6 mg/LSB (0x7F = +2 g)

Data Output.name: DATAX
Data Output.description: X-axis data low byte register | X-axis data high byte register

Data Output.name: DATAY
Data Output.description: Y-axis data low byte register | Y-axis data high byte register

Data Output.name: DATAZ
Data Output.description: Z-axis data low byte register | Z-axis data high byte register

Tap Detection.name: THRESH_TAP

fields.name: THRESH_TAP
fields.description: Threshold value for tap interrupts (62.5 mg/LSB)

quality_issues: address 0x1D not found in register summary table

Tap Detection.name: Latent
Tap Detection.description: Latent register for tap detection. Specifies the time after the first tap before the second tap can start.

Tap Detection.name: Window
Tap Detection.description: Window register. Specifies the amount of time after the latency time within which the second tap must occur.

fields.name: SUPPRESS
fields.description: Suppress double tap if accel > THRESH_TAP between taps

Tap Detection.name: ACT_TAP_STATUS
Tap Detection.description: Source of tap/double tap and activity events

fields.name: TIME_INACT
fields.description: The TIME_INACT register is eight bits and contains an unsigned time value representing the amount of time that acceleration must be less than the value in the THRESH_INACT register for inactivity to be declared. The scale factor is 1 sec/LSB. A value of 0 results in an interrupt when the output data is less than the value in the THRESH_INACT register.

Activity/Inactivity.name: ACT_INACT_CTL
Activity/Inactivity.description: Axis enable control for activity and inactivity detection
